docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY KAMKAR, BABAK AS TO DEFENDANT BRIDGE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT COMPANY TL PROPERTIES PARTNERS LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-07-2026 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL APPROVED*** PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT.
STIPULATION TO USE A JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY KAMKAR, BABAK BRIDGE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT COMPANY TL PROPERTIES PARTNERS LLC
REMARK: RECEIVED MAIL BY POST OFFICE ON FEB 04, 2026. SMALL CLAIMS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO TL PROPERTIES PARTNERS LLC RETURN TO SENDER -NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) CARRIE JEFFORDS FILED BY DEFENDANT BRIDGE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT COMPANY TL PROPERTIES PARTNERS LLC

REMARK: RECEIVED MAIL BY POST OFFICE ON JAN 12, 2026. SMALL CLAIMS - CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO TL PROPERTIESS PARTNERS LLS. ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-20-2026 - JUDGMENT.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAMKAR, BABAK ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-07-2026 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JAN-20-2026 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-20-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-20-2026 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MARGARET WU. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF BABAK KAMKAR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS BRIDGE PROPERTY COMPANY AND TL PROPERTIES PARTNERS LLC ARE PRESENT AND APPEARING IN COURT IS CARRIE JEFFORD. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KAMKAR, BABAK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BRIDGE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT COMPANY TL PROPERTIES PARTNERS LLC PLAINTIFF DID NOT MEET HIS LEGAL BURDEN TO SHOW THAT THE CONDITIONS OF THE PROPERTY OPERATED BY DEFENDANTS MADE THAT PROPERTY UNINHABITABLE OR THAT DEFENDANTS FAILED TO RESPOND REASONABLY TO HIS COMPLAINTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAMKAR, BABAK
ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT (SC-108A) IS DENIED*** BY REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF.
